_meta.description: v1.3 スモーク：アメリカ人(人物=v1_2据え置きの退行確認) + 銀行(建物=再設計の検証)。

vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "アメリカ人" (American person) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A generic adult person in plain, neutral everyday clothes, standing in a natural relaxed upright posture. The PERSON is the single main subject and fills 70-80% of the frame — face, full body and posture clearly and completely rendered. As a SMALL secondary accent only, a tiny national flag pin or small fabric patch is worn on the chest or lapel: the Stars and Stripes, with red and white horizontal stripes and a blue canton with white star shapes in the upper-left corner. This flag pin is deliberately small — roughly coin-sized relative to the body, no more than about 4% of the image area. It is a subtle identifying detail, NOT the focus, NOT enlarged, NOT held in the hands, NOT printed across the clothing. Neutral, friendly, welcoming expression. No other props, no costume, no uniform.
The flag's shapes and colors may be shown on the small pin, but DO NOT render any written text, letters, numbers or characters of any script on the flag or anywhere in the image.
Pose and expression: standing relaxed and upright, arms loosely at the sides, a slight warm smile, the body oriented to the camera at the diagonal 3/4 angle described below.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the
subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees
to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view
simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, NO characters of ANY script (including Japanese kanji/kana), no captions, no symbols anywhere — at any position in the rendered output. The small flag pin may show shapes and colors only, never any writing.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a bank at a glance,
from its architecture and the single scene below — WITHOUT any written label.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a small, plain one- to two-story neighbourhood bank building with a simple glass entrance door.
The facade is deliberately clean and minimal: large unbroken flat wall surfaces and
generous empty space. The building carries NO attached fixtures of any kind — it is a
plain continuous surface. Where a real building might have a sign, render that area as
plain blank wall, NOT as a framed board or panel.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective, no fisheye distortion.
The background is a single flat pale sky-blue colour that fills the ENTIRE image edge to
edge (full-bleed) — no white border, no inset rectangle, no second background colour.
Scene (this is the ONLY content besides the building — do not add anything else):
A single ATM machine is set flush into the wall beside the glass entrance, and one person stands using that ATM. Nothing else is added.
Keep the whole composition minimal and uncluttered: favour large empty wall and empty
sky over detail. Do NOT add any extra people, vehicles, panels, boards, fixtures,
plants, poles, furniture, or background objects beyond the one Scene line above.
The upper third of the image is plain empty sky with nothing in it.
The building occupies about 60-68% of the frame, comfortably surrounded by empty space.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: pale sky-blue full-bleed background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm colors for the building facade,
warm amber gold for small accent details only.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
Render absolutely NO text, NO letters, NO numbers and NO characters of ANY script
anywhere in the image (this explicitly includes Japanese kanji and kana, and Latin words
such as building names or "RECEPTION"). If the building would normally show a sign,
leave that surface as plain blank wall — do not draw a framed empty panel there.
No extra signage fixtures, no banners, no mascots, no clutter.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
